name: Slovak Christmas Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash mushrooms well and cut into small pieces.
2. Cook the mushrooms in 2 quarts of water for 30 minutes.
3. Add sauerkraut and cook for another 15 minutes.
4. Melt 2 tablespoons shortening in a saucepan, add flour, and brown lightly.
5. Stir constantly while pouring in milk until smooth.
6. Combine the sauce with mushrooms and sauerkraut.
7. Fry onions in butter until light brown.
8. Pour the onion mixture into the soup and cook for one minute.
9. Season with salt to taste.
10. Sprinkle paprika over all.
11. Makes 6 servings.
